generated_oml:
instance EnvironmentalReadingsDataTransmitted : dt:DataTransmitted [
    dt:producedFrom EnvironmentalReadingsSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : dt:DataTransmitted [
    dt:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyUsageDataTransmitted : dt:DataTransmitted [
    dt:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalReadingsSensor : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing environmental readings such as temperature, humidity, and air quality for real-time monitoring",
    dt:producedData EnvironmentalReadingsDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy data collection devices for tracking building occupancy patterns",
    dt:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageSensor : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring energy consumption data from building systems",
    dt:producedData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems in the building"
]

instance HVACActuator : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC system control"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption based on real-time data"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for improving visual comfort through lighting and shading adjustments"
]

instance HealthEffectBalancingInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Balancing non-visual health effects through environmental adjustments"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visual representation of building operations for informed decision-making"
]

instance AdaptiveControlInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Adaptive control recommendations generated via reinforcement learning for dynamic building management"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems and environmental conditions",
    dt:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectBalancingInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and optimization of energy consumption using BIM and sensor data",
    dt:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis and optimization of visual comfort parameters in building environments",
    dt:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance HealthEffectsService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring and optimization of non-visual health effects from environmental factors",
    dt:provides HealthEffectBalancingInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure management decisions",
    dt:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectBalancingInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine",
    dt:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ReinforcementLearningAdaptiveControlService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Custom service for reinforcement learning-based adaptive control of building systems",
    dt:provides AdaptiveControlInsight
]

instance EclipseHono : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data ingestion platform for real-time sensor data processing",
    dt:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for state synchronization and data integration",
    dt:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for interactive building simulation and display",
    dt:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for creating and enriching semantic building models",
    dt:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework for automated runtime interface generation and semantic extraction",
    dt:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, HealthEffectsService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService, ReinforcementLearningAdaptiveControlService
]

instance EnvironmentalReadingsData : dt:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental readings data including temperature, humidity, and air quality metrics",
    dt:fromData EnvironmentalReadingsDataTransmitted,
    dt:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : dt:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data collected from post-occupancy sensors tracking building usage patterns",
    dt:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    dt:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EnergyUsageData : dt:Data [
    base:desc "Energy consumption data from building systems for monitoring and optimization",
    dt:fromData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted,
    dt:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : dt:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of the LEED Platinum academic building",
    dt:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance UnrealVisualizationModel : dt:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for Unreal Engine 5 to support interactive building visualization",
    dt:inputTo UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance LEEDPlatinumBuilding : dt:Environment [
    base:contains [
        EnvironmentalReadingsSensor,
        OccupancySensor,
        EnergyUsageSensor,
        LightingActuator,
        HVACActuator,
        BIMModel,
        UnrealVisualizationModel,
        EnvironmentalReadingsData,
        OccupancyData,
        EnergyUsageData,
        EclipseHono,
        EclipseDitto,
        UnrealEngine5,
        BIMTools,
        ModelDrivenEngineering,
        RealTimeMonitoringService,
        EnergyOptimizationService,
        VisualComfortService,
        HealthEffectsService,
        PredictiveAnalyticsService,
        InteractiveVisualizationService,
        ReinforcementLearningAdaptiveControlService,
        EnergyOptimizationInsight,
        VisualComfortInsight,
        HealthEffectBalancingInsight,
        VisualizationInsight,
        AdaptiveControlInsight
    ]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "transmission of control signals (e.g., for lighting, HVAC) from the DT to physical Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time adjustment"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "centralized framework where BIM models are transformed into runtime artifacts using MDE, with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for modular services, orchestrated through coordinated roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "operational phase (as operated)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the reflection of physical counterpart, ensuring interoperability and architectural soundness"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for bidirectional communication, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT) are not explicitly detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) is used as a foundational standard; specific standards like IFC or MQTT are not explicitly referenced in the provided documents."
]
